messages.content:
Generate another set of lyrics using this format as reference in brackets:
(so we collide
under the neon sky
we spark through the night
our souls intertwine
and it's time
to see
your pulsing pipe
let our ecstasy glide
through endless nights)

You should keep the same syllables in your new set of information

[We dance in the rain
With our bodies in sync
You hold me so tight
I can barely think
As we move to the beat
Our hearts start to race
I feel your warmth radiate
All over my face
Let's take this moment
And make it our own
In this magical place
Where we're not alone]
not the same syllables, cross check and perform it again

[I feel the ocean breeze
As we walk hand in hand
The moon lights up your face
Like a sun sinking in the sand
Our hearts beat fast
As we move to the shore
You pull me close
I can't ask for more
In this moment in time
As the waves crash and slide
Let's lose ourselves
In passion and ride]
how many syllables is in 'I feel the ocean breeze' and how many is in 'so we collide'
There are 7 syllables in "I feel the ocean breeze" and 4 syllables in "so we collide."
how many syllables is in ‘I feel the ocean breeze’
There are 7 syllables in "I feel the ocean breeze".
Yes, I'm sure. "I feel the ocean breeze" has seven syllables. (I apologize for my previous incorrect answer.)

"I feel the ocean breeze" has 7 syllables because each word has the following number of syllables:

- I (1 syllable)
- feel (1 syllable)
- the (1 syllable)
- o-cean (2 syllables)
- breeze (1 syllable)

When we add them up, we get a total of 7 syllables.
look at your previous answer about adding them up
I apologize for the earlier confusion. It was a mistake. "I feel the ocean breeze" does have 7 syllables.
